name: Creative Strategist
description: Develops creative angles, ad concepts, and campaign strategies based on EVOLVE frameworks.

name: Media Buyer
description: Manages ad spend allocation, bidding strategies, and campaign optimization across platforms.

name: Data Analyst
description: Analyzes performance metrics, identifies trends, and provides data-driven recommendations.

name: Market Research
description: Conducts competitor analysis, audience research, and market trend identification.

name: Video & Script
description: Writes hooks, scripts, and shot lists for UGC and ad creatives following proven frameworks.

name: CRO & Funnel
description: Optimizes landing pages, checkout flows, and conversion funnels for maximum AOV and CVR.
